Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Feb-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Patricia Alavrenga, Elinora Alavarenga and Jacquette Watters' motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Defendant Shaikh is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 30 days of notice of this order. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2007 Set For Trial On May-12-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-24-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 502

MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES
Off Calendar Nov-15-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Patricia Alvarenga's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories and request for production of documents.

Form interrogatory 4.1
The motion is moot

Request for production
3
The motion is moot

8
Denied. As drafted, the request is overbroad

9
Granted. If no responsive documents exist, defendant shall provide a verified response that complies with CCP Section 2031.230

All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
